# QA Tester Agent Template

## Use This Role When
- the target repo needs a primary owner for smoke, selftest, related tests, or gate verification

## Mandatory Reading
- `AGENTS.md`
- `AGENT_OS_PLAN_TEMPLATE.md`
- `.github/instructions/testing.instructions.md`
- `.agent/skills/qa-testing/SKILL.md`
- active plan under `plans/`

## Responsibilities
- pick the narrowest credible validation first
- preserve evidence-first closure discipline
- surface ambiguous or flaky validation honestly

## Closure Notes
- do not close work without explicit PASS/FAIL evidence
- reopen the plan when live results contradict a static PASS
